title: FSI-CopilotGov Collector Evidence Contract
description: Normalized schema mapping raw collector JSON output to control_id / evidence_key / status rows consumed by the assessment engine and SPA importer.

schemaVersion.description: Semantic version of the evidence contract schema.

sources.description: Collector source definitions keyed by source name (graph, purview, sharepoint, sentinel).

mappings.description: Array of evidence mappings from collector output paths to control/evidence rows.

filename.description: Expected filename in the collected/ directory (e.g. graph.json).

controlId.description: Control ID this evidence row maps to (e.g. 1.2, 3.1).

collectorField.description: Canonical field name used in authored_content.py and the SPA (e.g. DSPM_OversharingAssessment).

jsonPath.description: JSONPath or dot-notation path into the collected JSON where the evidence lives (e.g. auditConfig.UnifiedAuditLogIngestionEnabled).

evaluator.description: Engine evaluator function name or rule that converts the raw value to pass/partial/fail.

evaluatorArgs.description: Optional arguments for the evaluator (e.g. threshold for count_gte, keyword for contains_keyword).

evidenceKey.description: Human-readable key for reporting (e.g. 'UAL enabled', 'DLP Copilot policy count').

status.description: Default status when collector data is unavailable.
